name: Cinnamon Nut Coffee Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the topping ingredients in a small separate bowl and set aside.
2. Cream the butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
3. Add the eggs, one at a time, to the butter mixture, mixing well after each addition.
4. In a separate bowl, whisk together the flour, baking powder, baking soda, salt, sour milk or buttermilk, and almond extract.
5. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the creamed mixture, alternating with the sour milk or buttermilk, until combined.
6. Pour half of the batter into a greased tube pan.
7. Sprinkle half of the topping mixture over the batter and swirl it in.
8. Add the remaining batter and sprinkle the remaining topping on top.
9. Bake at 350 degrees F (175 degrees C) for 45 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
